title: Invariant Testing, Fuzzing, and Reproducible Benchmarks · Cost-Model Clinic: Random Sequences
summary: Audit custom structures whose happy paths pass but long random operation sequences corrupt state. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa random sequences increment in a model-based test and benchmark harness. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Generate reproducible operation sequences and retain seeds for failures.
Compare custom operations against a simpler trusted reference model.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
